revision.change_summary: Migrated MQB ID88 transponder component to revisioned compatibility and workshop verification structure

key.notes: Confirm the exact key system, vehicle generation and tool preparation method before generating or programming a key.

exclusions.condition: A different transponder generation or later MQB security system is confirmed
exclusions.action: Reference the exact transponder component instead

conditions: ID88 family naming alone does not prove compatibility with every MQB vehicle
Remote frequency, key part number and transponder preparation must be verified separately
Related-platform evidence must not be presented as exact-model verification
